title: antennaria meredithae
intro: Antennaria meredithae, also known as Meredith's everlasting, is a rare and endangered flowering plant species native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. As a member of the Asteraceae family, it is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, Antennaria meredithae is prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts have been used in folk medicine for various purposes.
